change.description: Classifies the type of change in a pull request. Exactly one change label must be applied per PR.

labels.name: change:feature
labels.description: New functionality added. Typically results in a minor version bump.

labels.name: change:bugfix
labels.description: Correction of incorrect behavior. Typically results in a patch version bump.

labels.name: change:refactor
labels.description: Internal restructuring with no behavior change. Typically no version bump.

labels.name: change:docs
labels.description: Documentation-only changes with no code impact. No version bump.

labels.name: change:governance
labels.description: Changes to governance policies, constitutional documents, or compliance rules. Requires governance-class approval.

labels.name: change:release
labels.description: Release process, CI/CD, or workflow changes. No version bump unless artifact output changes.

labels.name: change:metadata
labels.description: Project metadata, labels, non-behavioral configuration. No version bump.

labels.name: change:breaking-change
labels.description: Backward-incompatible change requiring major version bump and migration notes.

approval.description: Classifies the approval level required for a pull request. Exactly one approval label must be applied per PR.

labels.name: approval:standard
labels.description: Standard review and approval process. Applies to routine features, fixes, and refactors.

labels.name: approval:sensitive
labels.description: Elevated review required. Applies to changes touching CI, CODEOWNERS, security, or broad cross-cutting concerns.

labels.name: approval:governance-class
labels.description: Governance steward authorization required. Applies to policy, constitutional, and protected asset changes.

labels.name: approval:emergency
labels.description: Expedited approval for critical production fixes. Does not override governance-class requirements.

labels.name: approval:release-critical
labels.description: Release-blocking change requiring release manager confirmation before merge.

status.description: Tracks the workflow status of a pull request through the governance pipeline.

labels.name: status:needs-contract
labels.description: PR is missing a task contract. Architect must create one before work proceeds.

labels.name: status:blocked
labels.description: PR is blocked by a compliance violation, missing approval, or unresolved escalation.

labels.name: status:in-progress
labels.description: Builder is actively implementing within an approved task contract.

labels.name: status:ready-for-review
labels.description: Implementation complete. Awaiting validator compliance review.

labels.name: status:validated
labels.description: Validator has rendered a pass decision. Ready for merge or release manager review.

labels.name: status:released
labels.description: Change has been included in a release. Release manager has confirmed.

role.description: Indicates which agent role is currently responsible for the next action on this PR.

labels.name: role:architect
labels.description: Architect action required: contract creation, amendment, or reclassification.

labels.name: role:builder
labels.description: Builder action required: implementation within contract scope.

labels.name: role:validator
labels.description: Validator action required: compliance review and decision.

labels.name: role:release-manager
labels.description: Release manager action required: version confirmation or release authorization.

labels.name: role:docs-manager
labels.description: Documentation manager action required: sync verification or drift assessment.

labels.name: role:governance-steward
labels.description: Governance steward action required: governance-class approval or constitutional review.

release.description: Indicates the version impact classification for release management.

labels.name: release:none
labels.description: No version bump required. Internal-only change.

labels.name: release:patch
labels.description: Patch version bump. Backward-compatible bug fix.

labels.name: release:minor
labels.description: Minor version bump. Backward-compatible new functionality.

labels.name: release:major
labels.description: Major version bump. Breaking change requiring migration.

labels.name: release:governance-only
labels.description: Governance-only change. No artifact version bump unless governance versioning is enabled.

labels.name: docs:needs-update
labels.description: Documentation update required. Canonical source was modified but derived surfaces were not updated.

labels.name: docs:needs-sync
labels.description: Wiki or derived surface requires synchronization with canonical source.

labels.name: docs:drift-detected
labels.description: Content divergence detected between canonical and derived documentation surfaces.

labels.name: docs:compliant
labels.description: All documentation surfaces are synchronized and accurate.
